div.p: Premium vehicle rentals for every journey. From economy cars to luxury SUVs, we have the perfect vehicle waiting for you.

button.class: btn btn-primary w-100 h-50 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center mt-2

div.p:
Choose from our premium fleet of well-maintained vehicles
— Pricing:

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if kw and not kw.get('vehicle_category_id') else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('vehicle_category_id') == str(category.id) else None
'selected' if kw and not kw.get('price') else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('price') == '0-50' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('price') == '50-100' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('price') == '100+' else None
'selected' if kw and not kw.get('tr') else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('tr') == 'automatic' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('tr') == 'manual' else None
'selected' if kw and not kw.get('ft') else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('ft') == 'diesel' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('ft') == 'gasoline' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('ft') == 'full_hybrid' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('ft') == 'plug_in_hybrid_diesel' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('ft') == 'plug_in_hybrid_gasoline' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('ft') == 'cng' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('ft') == 'lpg' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('ft') == 'hydrogen' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('ft') == 'electric' else None
'selected' if kw and not kw.get('seats') else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('seats') == '2_plus' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('seats') == '4_plus' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('seats') == '5_plus' else None
'selected' if kw and kw.get('seats') == '7_plus' else None

div.p: Price auto-selected based on your rental duration ()

div.div: Pricing applied: (auto-detected based on rental duration)

div.label: I accept the Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy

span.class: d-block fa fa-4x fa-thumbs-up mx-auto rounded-circle bg-primary

h5.span:
Your vehicle booking enquiry for
has been successfully submitted.

input.name: search
input.placeholder: Search by lead, vehicle, category, seats...

div.strong: There are currently no enquiries for your account.

a.t-att-href: pager['page_next']['url'] if pager['page']['num'] != pager['page_count'] else None
